name: 8pc Pinch Pleat Comforter Bedding Set - Threshold™
description:
Dress up your sleep space with a hint of shabby-chic elegance with the 8pc Montvale Pinch Pleat Comforter Set from Threshold™. Simply stylish pinch pleats add texture and dimension for a look that's brimming with timeless elegance, while the solid color options are easy to pair with a variety of different decors. Paired with a soft comforter, this bedding set includes matching pillow shams, Euro shams and decorative pillows to complete the stunning look.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
